Simple, transparent pricing

Start free for 14 days. No credit card required.

Starter

Perfect for coaches just getting started

£0/month
  • Up to 10 clients
  • Training programs with templates
  • Weekly check-ins with photos
  • Nutrition tracking
  • Habit tracking with streaks
  • Client messaging
  • Basic progress metrics
  • Email support
  • iOS & Android apps
  • No credit card required
⭐ Most Popular

Pro

For established coaches scaling their business

£29/month
  • Unlimited clients
  • All Starter features
  • AI Coach Assistant (24/7)
  • Loom video feedback
  • Body fat % tracking
  • Custom brand colours & logo
  • Advanced progress reports
  • Priority support
  • Stripe payments built-in
  • Early access to new features

Team

For multi-practitioner clinics and teams

£79/month
  • Unlimited clients
  • Up to 5 coaches/practitioners
  • All Pro features
  • Team dashboard & permissions
  • Shared client library
  • Dedicated onboarding call
  • Custom contracts template
  • Phone support
  • Revenue analytics
  • Team activity logs

All plans include 14-day free trial, iOS & Android apps, and cancel anytime with no lock-in contracts.

Frequently asked questions

Everything you need to know about Propel pricing.

Do I need a credit card for the trial?

No! Your 14-day free trial requires zero credit card information. You get full access to all features with no strings attached. When your trial ends, you can choose to upgrade to a paid plan.

What happens after the trial ends?

Your account and all client data remain safe. You can extend your trial by 7 additional days, upgrade to a paid plan, or let your account expire. Either way, your clients are never locked in to your account.

Can I change plans later?

Absolutely! Switch plans at any time. If you upgrade mid-month, you'll only pay the pro-rata difference. If you downgrade, the change takes effect on your next billing cycle.

How do I cancel?

Cancel anytime from your billing settings — one click, no questions asked. You'll retain access until the end of your billing cycle. There are no lock-in contracts or cancellation fees.

Can I have multiple coaches on one account?

Yes! The Team plan supports up to 5 coaches with separate logins and role-based permissions. Each coach can manage their own client list or collaborate on shared clients.

Is there a setup fee?

Nope. No setup fees, no hidden charges, no per-client fees. You only pay for your plan. If you want dedicated onboarding support, that's included on Team plans.

Ready to get started?

Pick a plan above and start your free trial. No credit card required.

Start free trial
